title: FOOTLOOSE 80s NORTHAMPTON — A MOST EXCELLENT 80s PARTY
description: A full-throttle 80s night at The Picturedrome—synth pop, new wave and rock anthems from start to finish. Big choruses, dance-floor classics and friendly party vibes all night.

title: FOOTLOOSE 80s DAY PARTY BEDFORD
description: Daytime Footloose at Bedford Esquires—pure 80s feel-good with sing-alongs and floor-fillers. Ideal for an afternoon out; home in time for the evening.

title: SILENT DISCO NORTHAMPTON: POP VS INDIE VS DANCE
description: Three simultaneous DJs at The Picturedrome—switch between Pop, Indie and Dance on your headphones. Lively crowd energy, friendly rivalry and massive tunes until late.

title: THE 2PM CLUB™ COVENTRY - 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
description: Over-25s daytime disco at hmv Empire packed with 80s/90s/00s bangers. High energy, zero late night—dance, sing and still make dinner plans.

title: THE 2PM CLUB™ MK - 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
description: Over-25s afternoon party at MK11 with the biggest 80s/90s/00s hits. Short and punchy session—big tunes, daylight finish.

title: THE 2PM CLUB™ NORTHAMPTON - 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
location: cinch Stadium at Franklin's Gardens, Northampton
description: Northampton's daytime disco for over-25s—wall-to-wall 80s/90s/00s floor-fillers, happy crowds and home before sunset.

title: FAMILY SILENT DISCO Halloween Party Bedford
description: All-ages Halloween silent disco at Bedford Esquires. Multiple channels on wireless headphones, costumes encouraged and volume-friendly for kids.

title: THE 2PM CLUB™ BIRMINGHAM - 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
description: Birmingham's over-25s afternoon bash—80s, 90s and 00s anthems you know every word to. Big energy, home at a decent hour.

title: FAMILY SILENT DISCO Halloween Party Northampton
description: Family Halloween silent disco at The Picturedrome with multi-channel headphones and fancy-dress fun. Great for all ages with daytime timing.

title: THE 2PM CLUB™ LUTON - 80s 90s 00s Daytime Disco
description: Luton's over-25s daytime disco at Hat Factory—back-to-back 80s/90s/00s favourites for a proper afternoon sing-along.

title: FAMILY SILENT DISCO Luton
description: Family-friendly silent disco with several music channels and comfy volume levels. Dance together across the generations at Hat Factory.

title: CHRISTMAS SILENT DISCO NORTHAMPTON
description: Festive three-channel silent disco at The Picturedrome—Christmas classics alongside decades favourites. Headphones provided; swap channels to suit the mood.

title: THE 2PM CLUB™ Northampton - Christmas Daytime Disco
description: Seasonal edition of the over-25s daytime disco—festive bangers with 80s/90s/00s crowd-pleasers in the mix. Daytime start, Christmassy finish.

title: Boombastic's Christmas Decades Party NORTHAMPTON
description: Big Christmas night spanning 80s/90s/00s at The Picturedrome—chorus-heavy party anthems and festive floor-fillers for a full-house sing-along.

title: Christmas FAMILY SILENT DISCO Northampton
description: Family Christmas silent disco—festive tunes on multiple channels with friendly volumes for little ears. Daytime session at The Picturedrome.

title: FAMILY SILENT DISCO Halloween Party Milton Keynes
description: Family Halloween silent disco at MK11 with multi-channel headphones. Fancy-dress welcome; daytime hours and child-friendly volumes.
